launcher.title: 🕹 Spire Arcade
launcher.subtitle: A growing cabinet of games to play between scenes. Each game unlocks once, then it's yours to keep.
launcher.eidolonDescription: Hatch a gothic familiar, one of four eggs, or hatch one of your own pets, then keep it fed, played with, clean, and well. It lives on while you're away. Feed it food from your bag, cure it with a potion.
launcher.urugalDescription: A gothic roguelike. Pick a class and delve a procedurally-built dungeon: fight, loot, and descend as deep as you dare. Every run is different, and every floor is a fresh gamble.
launcher.grimholdDescription: A cabinet of six cursed amusements: Runefall, Loong, Arrowstorm, The Spire, Graveward, and Voidwake. Quick arcade runs that trickle Currency and XP, daily-capped.

eidolon.forbidden: The Arcade is closed to you right now.
eidolon.locked: This game is locked. Unlock the Eidolon Tamer from the Spire Arcade.

hardy.label: Hardy
hardy.flavor: Shrugs off illness and clings to life.

gluttonous.label: Gluttonous
gluttonous.flavor: Always hungry, but food delights it.

stoic.label: Stoic
stoic.flavor: Even-tempered; slow to sadden, slow to cheer.

vivacious.label: Vivacious
vivacious.flavor: Big feelings: dips fast, but cheers fast.

select.title: Choose an egg to summon
select.needPet: - acquire a pet to hatch one as a familiar -

readout.dragWisp: <0>Drag the wisp</0> near your familiar, then release.

hall.title: The Hall, familiars past
hall.empty: No familiars have departed yet. Those you raise will be remembered here.

sell.title: Sells for the currency it has earned (an inherited head-start isn't counted), and frees you to tame anew

dead.notice: It has gone dormant. A magical item will wake it.

drawer.reviveNote: Your familiar lies dormant. A magical item will wake it to a fragile second life.
drawer.basicHealTitle: Spend currency on a basic heal
drawer.emptyFood: No food in the shop yet.
drawer.emptyRevive: You need a magical item to wake it.
drawer.emptyToy: No toys in the shop yet.
drawer.emptyRemedy: No curatives in the shop yet.

picker.confirmSpend: Use this community emoticon for {{cost}} Currency? {{cost}} Currency goes to the sheet's creator. You won't be asked again this session.
picker.communityTabTitle: Community emoticons (1 Currency per use, paid to the creator)
picker.cellCostOwner: {{label}} ({{cost}} Currency per use for visitors; free for you)
picker.noLabeledCellsYet: This sheet has no labeled cells yet.
picker.communityEmpty: No community sheets yet. Approved user-submitted sheets show up here. Paid sheets cost {{cost}} Currency per use (goes to the creator); free sheets are marked Free.
picker.noLabeledCells: This sheet has no labeled cells.
picker.noMatch: No emoji match “{{query}}”. Try a synonym like “happy” or “love”.

typeahead.footer: ↑↓ navigate · enter / tab to insert · esc to dismiss

build.spec: Sheets are <1>4x4 grid, square cells</1>, submitted at <3>600x600px</3> (so each cell is 150x150px) as <5>PNG, WebP, or APNG with a transparent background</5> so reactions composite cleanly over any chat theme. JPEG / GIF also accepted but transparency is lost.
build.animated: <0>WebP and APNG can be animated</0>. Looping idle frames, blinks, shimmer, etc. all carry through to the picker. You can work at a larger canvas while drawing for clarity, but downscale to 600x600px before submitting so file size stays reasonable.
build.gridNote: The alignment grid's borders are visual guides only. Strip them out of your final sheet so peers don't see grid lines around every reaction.

form.paidFromMaster: Paid from <1>your master pool</1>: <3></3> per submission
form.slugError: Slug must be 1-40 chars, lowercase letters/digits/hyphens, no leading/trailing dash.
form.imageLabel: Sheet image. 4x4 grid at <1>600x600px</1> (150px cells). <3>Transparent PNG, WebP, or APNG recommended</3> (WebP / APNG can be animated); JPEG / GIF accepted but lose transparency. ≤6 MB.
form.cellLabelsNote: Pre-filled to match the demo sheet's mood order. Edit any cell whose reaction differs, or blank it out to hide that slot from the picker. Order matches the 4x4 grid left-to-right, top-to-bottom.
form.reviewNote: Reviewed by a moderator. Rejected submissions are refunded.
form.unsupportedType: Unsupported image type, use PNG, APNG, JPEG, WebP, or GIF.
form.tooLarge: File is larger than 6 MB, please compress or resize.
